revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: create page
Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] (crud category cleanup) [https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22480594122 commit triggered pipeline]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1530s_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1530s_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8094367}} <!--interwikis--> <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]
